calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Connie Chen is present and assisted by Cantonese Interpreter/Friend, Wendy Liang.
Respondent, Yin Fang Ho is present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Parties inform the Court that they have come to the following settlement agreement:
Appellant shall pay Respondent a total of $5000.00.
Appellant shall pay Respondent $2500.00 no later than 5pm on Thursday, October 3, 2019. Respondent shall dismiss the case with the Rent Board by Sunday, October 6, 2019. Once the Rent Board action is dismissed, Appellant shall pay Respondent the remaining balance of$2500.00 no later than Thursday, October 30, 2019.

Matter is taken under submission until the terms of settlement are met.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: J. Guandique; Not Reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Judgment Entered
